commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=80da76695cf82eadd6dba8d04965ce14456b4c3f)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `agents.defaults.compaction.maxActiveTranscriptTokens`, wires it into the Codex app-server native-thread startup guard, and adds config/schema/help/test coverage for configured, default, and disabled token-guard behavior.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a config-feature PR rather than a broken current-main behavior report. The PR body does provide after-patch terminal proof for the exact runtime path by exercising patched modules against real temp binding and session files.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer sequencing and config-surface approval are needed because the PR is stacked on an open session-state PR and adds a new core config knob; the docs finding is narrow but not the only merge consideration.

target.title: fix(codex): make native thread token guard configurable
target.author: 100yenadmin

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
